waiting_for: Price to either reclaim EMA21 (30030.71) for EMA_BOUNCE long, or pull backtest EMA75 (30015.20) for deeper pullback entry

long_assessment.reasoning: Price pierced through EMA21 (now 3.21 pts below), invalidating the immediate EMA21 bounce. However, strong uptrend remains intact (EMA21>EMA75>EMA150). Next logical support is EMA75 at 30015.20 (12.30 pts below), which aligns with 30000 psych level 15 pts further down. Bearish FVG above at 30044-30052.75 provides upside target confluence. Stochastic at 57.28 shows momentum fading but not oversold. Waiting for price to reach EMA75 zone for higher-probability bounce entry. Stop at 29975 (below EMA150 + 15pt buffer) gives 40.2 pts risk. Target at bearish FVG top (30052.75) minus 5pt buffer = 30047.75. R/R = (30047.75-30015.20)/(30015.20-29975) = 32.55/40.2 = 1.82:1.

short_assessment.reasoning: Trend remains strongly bullish with aligned EMAs. Price above EMA75 and EMA150. Stochastic at 57.28 shows neutral-to-bullish momentum. Nearest bullish FVG below at 29950-29966 is 72 pts away - too distant for viable counter-trend short with acceptable R/R. No reversal price action, divergence, or breakdown of EMA structure. Shorting into strong uptrend without clear reversal signals is low probability.
